description: Phase 6 - Large Drawing Viewer: TiledDrawingViewer component with pan/zoom/rotate, tile pyramid status indicator, OCR text overlay toggle, fit-to-width/fit-to-page controls, page navigation for multi-page documents. All gated behind VITE_FF_LARGE_DRAWING_VIEWER feature flag.
steps: Create artifacts/edms/src/components/documents/TiledDrawingViewer.tsx: A React component gated by isFeatureEnabled('LARGE_DRAWING_VIEWER'). Props: documentId, fileUrl?, totalPages?, ocrOverlayData?. State: zoom (0.1-5.0), rotation (0/90/180/270), panOffset {x, y}, currentPage, showOcrOverlay, fitMode ('width'|'page'|'none'). Implements mouse-drag panning (onMouseDown/Move/Up), wheel zoom (onWheel with ctrl), keyboard shortcuts (+ zoom in, - zoom out, r rotate, o toggle overlay). Renders a container div with overflow:hidden containing a transform div. Uses Lucide icons (ZoomIn, ZoomOut, RotateCw, Maximize, Layers, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight).

Create artifacts/edms/src/components/documents/TilePyramidStatus.tsx: Shows tile generation progress. Props: totalTiles, completedTiles, failedTiles, status (OcrPipelineStatus from tiledOcrTypes.ts). Renders a progress bar (using Radix Progress), status text, and tile grid visualization (small colored squares: green=complete, yellow=processing, red=failed, gray=pending). Gated behind LARGE_DRAWING_VIEWER flag.

Create artifacts/edms/src/components/documents/OcrTextOverlay.tsx: Renders OCR text regions as positioned overlays on the drawing viewer. Props: regions (array of {text, x, y, width, height, confidence}), visible (boolean), zoom (number). Each region is an absolutely-positioned div with semi-transparent background, shows text on hover. Color-coded by confidence (green >85, yellow 60-85, red <60).

Create artifacts/edms/src/components/documents/DrawingViewerControls.tsx: Toolbar for the viewer. Props: zoom, rotation, fitMode, currentPage, totalPages, showOcrOverlay, onZoomIn, onZoomOut, onRotate, onFitWidth, onFitPage, onPageChange, onToggleOverlay. Renders a horizontal toolbar with Button components (from ui/Shared), page number input, zoom percentage display.

Create artifacts/edms/src/components/documents/LargeDrawingViewerPage.tsx: Page-level component that composes TiledDrawingViewer + TilePyramidStatus + DrawingViewerControls. Fetches document data using existing DocumentService, gets OCR job status from TiledOcrService. If feature flag disabled, shows a message 'Large drawing viewer is not enabled'. Exports as default for potential route registration.

Ensure all new components compile cleanly, use only existing UI primitives (Button, Badge, GlassCard from components/ui/Shared, Progress from @radix-ui/react-progress), and follow existing code conventions.
acceptance_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors
cd artifacts/edms && npx vite build succeeds
TiledDrawingViewer component renders without errors when feature flag is disabled (shows nothing or fallback)
TiledDrawingViewer component renders viewer UI when feature flag would be enabled
All zoom/pan/rotate state management is self-contained in the component
Page navigation supports 1 to totalPages range with boundary checks
OcrTextOverlay positions regions absolutely within the viewer container
findings: All 5 components created and verified. tsc --noEmit, vitest run, and vite build all pass cleanly. Used @radix-ui/react-progress directly via namespace import pattern. Components follow existing codebase conventions with feature flag gating.
